prompt: A surreal, highly detailed illustration of a pair of human lungs shaped like an urban city map. The branching airways resemble roads and highways, but most of the lung structure is densely packed with dark, crowded buildings and concrete blocks, creating a suffocating visual texture. Only a very small section of the lungs contains a patch of clean, green space with trees and open air, softly illuminated. The rest of the lungs appear heavy, congested, and oppressive. No text, no charts, no industrial smoke or factories. Focus on metaphorical storytelling, high contrast between the polluted and clean areas, top-down perspective, ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, conceptual editorial artwork style
dataset_name: WHO Global Air Pollution Data (PM2.5 Exposure)
insight: Over 90% of the world’s population breathes air that exceeds safe pollution limits
